# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a Python data processing application. Start from a full Ubuntu base image and install Python, pip, curl, wget, git, vim, and other useful development tools. This gives us flexibility for debugging and running various scripts in production.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:latest
MAINTAINER <NAME> <<EMAIL>>
 
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git python python-pip curl wget vim \ 
    && apt-get clean && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/* /tmp/* /var/tmp/* \
    && pip install awscli boto3==1.4.8 paramiko boto botocore s3transfer
 
COPY ./requirements.txt /tmp
 
RUN echo "[aws]" >> ~/.ssh/config 
RUN echo "    default = ssh -i /home/"$(whoami)"/.aws/secrets/default_key.pem -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null" >> ~/.ssh/config \
    && ssh-add "/home/"$(whoami)"/.aws/secrets/default_key.pem" 
RUN mkdir /home/"$(whoami)"/.aws
 
COPY ./awscreds.yml /home/"$(whoami)"/.aws \
    && pip install awscli --upgrade -i https://pypi.python.org/simple \ 
    && chmod +x /home/"$(whoami)"/.aws/*.sh \ 
    && chown "$(whoami)": /home/$(whoami)/.ssh
 
USER $(whoami)
 
RUN mkdir /usr/src/app 
WORKDIR /usr/src/app 
 
ADD . /usr/src/app 
  
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt
  
EXPOSE 80 \
   873 \
    21 \
    9418 \
    5569 \ 
   13474 \ 
   13477 \ 
    49772 
 
 
ENTRYPOINT [ "python" ] 
CMD [ "./main.py" ] 

# End of text
